meta.intent: Create a capture-friendly last-dry-tile rescue beat after the exam while keeping the urgent route obvious and fair.
meta.expectedPath: Follow the lower urgent route, use one dock-safe stabilizer during the approach, extract the hero puppy on the water-rise action, then finish the calmer upper puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: Wrong play spends safe side clears first and lets the hero route become too tight, usually ending in a rescue-path flood if the player ignores the urgent line.
meta.whatItProves: A water rescue can feel cinematic and generous while still using only action-count pressure and target-order reading.
meta.notes: Role: spectacle/recovery. No ice, vine, or reinforced crates; empty cells are route, spawn, water, and mobile-readability space.
